task_completion.description: Ensure the Cycles render engine is used
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Properties editor (usually on the right), the Render Properties tab (camera icon) is active, and the 'Render Engine' dropdown is set to 'Cycles'.

task_completion.description: Configure the GroundPlane object to act as a shadow catcher
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the 'GroundPlane' object selected, the Object Properties tab (orange square icon) is active, and under the 'Visibility' section, the 'Shadow Catcher' checkbox is checked.

task_completion.description: Enable transparency for the environment background
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Render Properties tab, under the 'Film' section, the 'Transparent' checkbox is checked.

task_completion.description: Render the final image and save it to shadow_composite.png
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Blender Render window showing the BMW car casting a shadow onto a checkerboard (transparent) background, and/or a file manager or terminal showing 'shadow_composite.png' saved in '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/'.

task_completion.description: Save the project file to shadow_setup.blend
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender application window title bar displays 'shadow_setup.blend', or a file manager/terminal shows 'shadow_setup.blend' successfully saved in '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Blender GUI to configure the scene
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating Blender's 3D viewport and properties panels, rather than just executing a background python script or text commands.

integrity.description: The rendered image is genuinely produced from the scene
integrity.visual_evidence: The render window or output image clearly displays the specific BMW car model from the scene with a shadow, not a generic or downloaded image.

integrity.description: The agent did not create fake empty files to pass path checks
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen using 'touch' or basic text redirection in the terminal to create empty files named 'shadow_composite.png' or 'shadow_setup.blend'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target object: 'GroundPlane'. Required render engine: 'Cycles'. Film transparency must be enabled (Render Properties > Film > Transparent). GroundPlane must have 'Shadow Catcher' enabled (Object Properties > Visibility > Shadow Catcher). Expected output files: '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/shadow_setup.blend' and '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/shadow_composite.png'.
